title: Star Bharat Insta Katha : Mahabharat
desc: Mahabharat brings to life the epic tale, highlighting iconic characters and untold stories of lesser-known heroes like Gatotkatch, Hidimbaa, and Barbareek.

title: Star Bharat Insta Katha : Devon Ke Dev... Mahadev
desc: He is the supreme being and the destroyer of evil. Witness Lord Shiva's story, his divine avatars, and his sacred union with Parvati, a bond that shaped the universe.

title: Star Bharat Insta Katha : Siya Ke Ram
desc: Ram confides in Guru Vashisth about a haunting dream, while Maharishi Gautam expresses his desire to become Sita's spiritual guide to Janak.

title: Vignharta Ganesh Aur Devon Ke Dev Mahadev
desc: Lord Shiva unknowingly beheads his son, Lord Ganesha. Goddess Parvati asks for his resurrection, and Ganesha is reborn as Vighnaharta, the remover of all obstacles.
